title: OCI-koppeling
desc: Koppel eenvoudig uw systeem met de webshop via een OCI

treatments.brief: Connection-status header (Anobel ⚓ ⇄ SAP S/4HANA, green 'Verbonden') + a 3-up live KPI row (bestellingen vandaag, laatste sync, uptime 30 d) + an encrypted-channel footer (OCI · versleuteld · TLS 1.3).

A horizontal punch-out round-trip flow: Eigen inkoopsysteem -> OCI punch-out (navy active node, the signature) -> Anobel-catalogus -> Winkelwagen terug in ERP, with a dashed return-loop arc underneath + a sync glyph.
A live PO-sync feed: header 'Gesynchroniseerd vandaag · 14 bestellingen'; a list of purchase orders (PO-2026-0481 MS Aldebaran €12.480 gesynct, etc.) each with a green 'gesynct' badge.
A node/integration diagram: a SAP tile on the left, a central navy Anobel hub (anchor), and cart + order-document tiles on the right, connected by dashed two-way links, with a 'Verbonden' chip.
A semicircular uptime/availability gauge (navy arc) reading 99,9% with '· 30 dagen' + a small 'laatste sync 2 min' stat.
